title: Random Chunks
description: Chunk(s) get randomized, thats basically it
body:
# Random Chunks
Every chunk in your World can be randomized.
I recommend using the Fabric Version. It has often a better performance.
Mod is available for Forge and Fabric and later also for Neoforge.

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eae5fb04076ceeb6979a55c9daf52dda95c3dac5_0.webp)

## Config Screen
You open the Config Screen with K in Default.

## Customization
1. You can select which blocks will be used by the Randomizer (Falling Blocks in Default disabled)
2. You can enable/disable chunks, so chunks wont be randomized again
3. Turn on Performance Mode. Chunks need longer to randomize but its smoother and has less lag
4. Change Randomization Radius. Only Chunks you enter, or in a radius


![Config Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c79ae68bf733718baa81e3054f2d83d0007934d_0.webp)
